title: [YTP] IT'S WWWIIINNNDDDOOOWWWSSS!!!
description:
A complete remake of my 2010 YTP "Steve Ballmer Sells Clean/Dirty Windows", except it's almost nothing like the original aside from preserving some classic jokes!

Fun fact, this YTP is 5x longer than the original source material, so give me some credit for squeezing this many stupid jokes out of it, eh?

HD 60fps version of the "Steve Ballmer Sells Windows" source contained here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_JzfROUDsK0
Version of Passport.mid used at the end: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cV9BtuPpW9w

Alternative titles I didn't go with:
STEVEMICROMERSOFTBALL
MICROSTEVESOFTBALLMER
MICROBALLSTEVESOFT
BALLSTEVEMERWINDOWSOFT
BEVE STALLMER SMELLS WINDOWS ONE POINT TOE
